content:
守密人你好：
       彌薩格大學校務處將於4月29日20:10進行校內設施修復，更新完成後您將得到通知，重新進入遊戲。對於更新可能給大家帶來的不便，我們會準備一份補給物資以示歉意。祝大家調查順利！ 
  
【補給物資】
在線維護補償：銀芯*50
  
【領取條件】
領取時間截至2025年5月13日23:59。請記得及時前往郵箱領取補給物資哦。  
 
【更新內容】
● 修復了部分數字存在重影的問題。
● 修復了在快速進入退出卡池時，右上角按鈕有概率消失的問題。
● 優化了啟靈回溯時，「喚醒體」還在派遣中的提示。
● 優化了英語版翻譯問題。

Greetings, Keepers! 
We have seen your latest feedback on English localization, and here's where things currently stand:

**[What We've Just Fixed:]**
● Fixed numbers in some __Posse and skill descriptions__ that weren't displaying correctly (our new translation tool accidentally broke the code in places).
● Corrected formatting for the __"Cleaning Progress"__ button in the Mop & Clean event.
● Unified inconsistent terms for:
    ○ Team Unique
    ○ Psyche Surge (Personality Deepening)
    ○ Soulforge Aptitude (Soul Shaping Aptitude)
    ○ Keyflare
● We are currently aware that other battle terms such as: Strength/STR [previously Power], HP, Aliemus [sometimes mistranslated as Madness], DMG Amplification [previously Strong Attack]) are still inconsistent. We're prioritizing fixing these and will release a full __pre- and post-edit combat terms list__ for reference as soon as possible.
● __Awakener Corposant’s name__ was machine-translated into over 20 versions (including Russian... somehow). We sincerely apologize! Due to time constraints, we couldn’t manually check all new content, and the GPT translation had a stroke. We’ve applied an emergency fix to unify the names and will fully proofread the new story next update.
● Fixed __"The Timeless Call"__ event banner’s rate-up text display.
● Removed extra quotation marks around some Awakener names.
● Corrected __Awakener Murphy and Tulu’s skill names__ ("R'leyh Reversed"/"When R'leyh Returns"):
    ○ The original Chinese "螺湮" means R'leyh—the machine translation wrongly rendered it as "eddy". After reviewing feedback and consulting our writers, we’ve updated R'leyh to "Lemuria" to match Morimens' lore (Lemuria is our canon name for R'leyh). Thank you for catching this!
● Fixed "Defense" showing as "DEF" due to a tool error.
